root_summary: Choose between preparation tools and reproducibility presets.
tools_summary: Main data preparation tools. Select one to configure and run.
presets_summary: Browse reproducibility presets for data preparation.

tools.name: Synthetic Data Generation
tools.node_summary: Design and generate synthetic longitudinal datasets with controlled trajectory patterns, shocks, changepoints, missingness, and harmonisation challenges.
tools.subtitle: Build controlled synthetic longitudinal datasets for benchmarking and exploratory workflows. Press Esc to exit.

tools.name: Data Conversion
tools.description: Convert cohort files across CSV, Parquet, and Stata formats.
tools.node_summary: Convert datasets between CSV, Parquet, and Stata formats in single-file or folder modes while keeping conversion settings explicit.
tools.subtitle: Convert cohort files between CSV, Parquet, and Stata in single-file or folder modes. Press Esc to exit.

presets.name: Prepare MCS by LEAP
presets.description: Run the five-stage MCS preset with guided path and output prompts.
